source.name: Atlanta event source registry
source.attribution: Official source pages and configured public event feeds

events.title: Ladies Night
events.description: in the Speakeasy! Join them for their Girl Dinner special, including your choice of a small plate, a half salad, and a martini for $30. Show your host that you’re following them on Instagram for entry to the secret Speakeasy.

events.title: Y’all’s Line is it Anyway?
events.description: Think you’re funnier than the cast? Prove it. In Y’all’s Line , the stage is open—and YOU are part of the show. Step out of your seat and into the spotlight as brave audience volunteers join our in-house improv team for a fast-paced night of games, scenes, and unpredictable laughs. Whether you’re playing or just watching your friends crash and burn (or accid

events.title: THE FABRIC OF LUXURY – Why Expensive Style Begins with Fabric
events.description: Hosted by personal stylist Darcy Harris at Mood Fabrics, this interactive seminar features hands-on fabric samples so you can touch, feel, and identify true luxury textiles. By learning to recognize high-quality construction firsthand, you will gain the insider knowledge needed to make smarter, long-lasting wardrobe purchases.

events.title: Lululemon EARTHSTRONG Series
events.description: Stretch your body and calm your mind with yoga, meditation, breathwork, sound healing, and other practices in this series. Flow through poses under the sun, connect with nature, and soak in the vibrant energy of Atlanta while joining a community of like-minded individuals. Grab a drink from Majesteas, Atlanta’s favorite tea vendor, after class. Bring your ow

events.title: Trivia with The Robys
events.description: Trivia Night with hosts The Robys. Join them every Thursday night at Glover Park in Marietta for the most unforgettable trivia experience this side of the Chattahoochee! They aren’t your average hosts! They are a dynamic duo bringing laughs, killer playlists, and next-level energy to your weeknight.

events.title: Live Music at The Alcove
events.description: Join us at The Alcove on the second floor for live music every other Thursday from 5–8 PM. Enjoy a rotating lineup of local musicians and genres throughout the season, with performances continuing through October 29.

events.title: Mood Sewciety Meetup: Open Sewing Session
events.description: Bring your WIP to Mood Fabrics Atlanta! Enjoy an open sewing session with live music, light refreshments, and fellow creatives.

events.title: 250 Years Of Humor For The 4th
events.description: From the very first jokes made along Boston Harbor during the tea party to the comedians watching UFC fights on the lawn of the White House, America has always tried to find the humor in the world. This weekend, let’s celebrate the most important of rights – our freedom of speech to laugh at some of the best comedians that call Atlanta home.

events.title: Marietta Square Art Walk
events.description: Shop, dine, and grab a drink for a stroll around the Square each First Friday of the month. Art Walk is a free self-guided walking tour that celebrates the vitality of Marietta’s diverse cultural Arts scene, showcasing local artists throughout Marietta Square.

events.title: Welcome to Atlanta Party
events.description: @ Reserve Your FREE Ticket Ticket Whether you’re a lifelong Atlanta resident or a first-time visitor, join us on Friday, July 3 , from 6:30pm-9:30pm for a sample of all things Atlanta! We’re closing out Civic Season and our 250th observances this year with a Welcome to Atlanta party – featuring a DJ, community resources from across the city, books and mercha

events.title: Independence Eve Concert
events.description: Marietta Parks, Recreation & Facilities announces that Atlanta’s own Drivin N Cryin will headline the City’s Independence Eve Concert on Friday, July 3, from 7:00 PM to 9:00 PM on the historic Marietta Square. The concert kicks off Marietta’s beloved Fourth in the Park weekend and is part of the community’s celebration of America’s 250th anniversary. Formed

events.title: Comedy on the Square
events.description: Join us for a night of uproarious laughter and side-splitting comedy at the Alley Stage’s Comedy on the Square! Prepare to be entertained by a lineup of top-notch comedians who will leave you rolling in the aisles with their hilarious performances. Our talented comedians, handpicked for their wit and charisma, will take the stage to deliver an unforgettable

events.title: Atlanta 4th of July Fireworks & Drone Light Show at Stone Mountain Park 2026 (Jul 3)
events.description: Gather the family for the Fantastic Fourth Celebration at Stone Mountain Park, featuring an all-new 250th-anniversary drone and laser light show projected on the mountain followed by a synchronized fireworks finale. The nightly spectacle with 250 choreographed drones is one of metro Atlanta's biggest Independence Day shows.
events.cost: Ticketed ($10+ for the light show; attractions ticket extra)

events.title: 250 Years Of Humor For The 4th
events.description: From the very first jokes made along Boston Harbor during the tea party to the comedians watching UFC fights on the lawn of the White House, America has always tried to find the humor in the world. This weekend, let’s celebrate the most important of rights – our freedom of speech to laugh at some of the best comedians that call Atlanta home.

events.title: AJC Peachtree Road Race 2026: July 4th 10K Finishes in Atlanta's Piedmont Park
events.description: Cheer on 60,000 runners at the world's largest 10K on the Fourth of July as the AJC/Northside Hospital Peachtree Road Race runs down Peachtree Street and finishes in Atlanta's Piedmont Park. The 57th running is a beloved all-ages Independence Day tradition with families lining the course to watch.
events.cost: Registration required ($60 members / $80 non-members); free to cheer along the route

events.title: Marietta Square Artisan Market
events.description: An open air showcase of locally made art. Every Saturday on Mill Street.

events.title: Marietta Square Farmers Market
events.description: The market has an average of 64 vendors and hundreds of customers each week. Market customers have lots of variety to choose from including heirloom tomatoes, fruits and vegetables that are rarely, if ever, available from the grocery store. We also have lots of the staples such as potatoes, onions, tomatoes, squash, and beans in addition to pattypan squash,

events.title: City of Marietta’s 4th in the Park Celebration
events.description: The City of Marietta’s 4th In The Park Celebration includes a morning parade, an all-day arts and crafts show, food, carnival games, plus an evening concert featuring Departure, and fireworks finale. Date: July 4 th from 10AM to 10PM Location: Marietta Square Coat: Free Event Application for the annual let Freedom Ring Parade are still open. This year’s para

events.title: Marietta 4th of July 2026: Let Freedom Ring Parade, Free Concert & Fireworks at Glover Park
events.description: Marietta's Fourth in the Park kicks off with the Let Freedom Ring Parade at 10 a.m. through downtown, then fills Glover Park with free food, kids' activities and live music all day. A free evening concert at 7 p.m. floats into a fireworks finale after dark for a classic family Independence Day.

events.title: Atlanta Run Club
events.description: Every Saturday at 8AM. Meet at the Atlanta Run Club kiosk in The Courtyard. Open to all levels. Walking is welcome. Regular communication regarding run details can be found on Atlanta Run Club’s Instagram .

events.title: Decatur 4th of July 2026: Pied Piper Parade, Free Concert & Fireworks on the Square
events.description: Decatur's hometown-style Fourth of July invites everyone to march in the Pied Piper Parade at 4 p.m. by foot, bike or wagon down to the downtown square. Stick around for free live music at 7 p.m. and a fireworks finale at approximately 9 p.m. for a classic family Independence Day.
events.venue: Downtown Decatur Square (line-up: First Baptist Church, 308 Clairemont Ave)

events.title: Nancy’s Flower Truck
events.description: rolls into the Ponce City Market Courtyard every Saturday from 1–6 PM. Stop by to build your own custom bouquet, shop fresh seasonal blooms, and take home a little something beautiful for the week ahead.

events.title: Sandy Springs Stars & Stripes 2026: Free July 4th Fireworks Celebration at City Green
events.description: Sandy Springs' annual Stars & Stripes celebration opens City Green at 4 p.m. on the Fourth of July with food trucks, live music and a big fireworks show to cap the night. It's a free, family-friendly way to spend Independence Day in the heart of the City Springs district.

events.title: City Winery Tour + Tasting
events.description: Uncover the secrets of Atlanta’s only urban winery with our resident sommelier! Every Saturday at 3pm, take an exclusive tour of City Winery Atlanta and learn about our winemaking journey — from grape to glass. events.title: Timba on the Shed
events.description: Enjoy an afternoon of non-stop Cuban music with a touch of bachata, perfect for dancing and connecting with friends. The fun starts at 5PM with a free salsa lesson, followed by music until around 8PM. Join us at Ponce City Market’s Shed, right by the BeltLine. This event happens every first Saturday of the month, so bring your friends and let’s dance!

events.title: Atlanta 4th of July Fireworks & Drone Light Show at Stone Mountain Park 2026
events.description: Celebrate the Fourth of July at Stone Mountain Park's Fantastic Fourth, where 250 drones, lasers and 4K imagery light up the mountain before a grand fireworks finale at 9:30 p.m. Spend the day on family attractions like the Summit Skyride and scenic railroad, then stretch out on the lawn for the all-ages show.
events.cost: Ticketed ($10+ for the light show; attractions ticket extra)

events.title: Fantastic Fourth Celebration
events.description: Stone Mountain Park's week-long Independence Day celebration with attractions, live entertainment, and a nightly 250th Celebration Drone & Light Show at 9:30 PM followed by a fireworks finale.

events.title: City Winery Tour + Tasting

events.title: Atlanta 4th of July Fireworks & Drone Light Show at Stone Mountain Park 2026 (Jul 5)
events.description: Missed the Fourth? Stone Mountain Park's Fantastic Fourth Celebration continues with its nightly drone, laser and fireworks show at 9:30 p.m. through July 6. It's a family-friendly way to extend the holiday weekend with one of the area's largest light spectacles.
events.cost: Ticketed ($10+ for the light show; attractions ticket extra)

events.title: Project Runway S22 Premiere After-Hours Watch Party & Meet-and-Greet
events.description: Celebrate fashion’s biggest night at the Mood Fabrics Showroom in Ponce City Market with an exclusive, after-hours Project Runway Premiere Watch Party. events.title: Fairytale Friday
events.description: Come to the Garden dressed as a favorite fairytale character, fairies, dragons, knights, princesses, witches and wizards. Starting at 11 a.m. in the Children’s Garden, enjoy a fairytale parade filled with music and bubbles. This event is free with Garden admission. Schedule: April 10, May 8, June 12, and July 10, (the second Friday of the month April – July)

events.title: Friday Night Live Music at Church Street Park
events.description: From June through October, the Church Street development is bringing local singer-songwriters and jazz combos to Church Street Park for an evening of live music under the open sky, one Friday a month from 6-8 p.m. No tickets. No cover. Just good music and good company. Bring a blanket, bring a chair, bring an entire picnic dinner! This is a recurring series.

events.title: Andrew Blooms Art Class – Dragons
events.description: Create your own Asian Art masterpiece in this 2 hour guided art class with Atlanta painter and tattoo artist Andrew Blooms. Learn the foundations of drawing and acrylic painting and create your very own piece of art inspired by traditional Asian art & tattooing. All materials and instructions are provided, just show up ready to create!
